# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based HR management system built with TypeScript, using Supabase as the backend. The application follows a component-driven architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Tech Stack
- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite with SWC for fast compilation
- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, Context API for global state
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions)
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication & Authorization
- Supabase Auth handles user sessions
- Role-based access control with granular permissions
- Protected routes with automatic redirects
- Employee data cached in Auth context to avoid repeated queries

### Data Flow
- React Query manages all server state with caching and optimistic updates
- Supabase client configured with real-time subscriptions where needed
- Edge functions handle complex business logic (payroll generation, notifications)

### Component Structure
- Atomic design: UI primitives → compound components → page components
- Custom hooks for business logic separation
- Utility functions in `/lib` for reusable logic

## Database Schema (Key Tables)

### Core Entities
- `companies` - Organization information
- `employees` - User profiles and employment data
- `roles` - Permission definitions
- `employee_roles` - User-role assignments

### HR Management
- `evaluations` - Quarterly performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations` - Real-time feedback
- `leave_requests` - Time-off management
- `leave_balances` - Accrued leave tracking
- `payroll_records` - Salary processing
- `loans` - Employee loan management

### Business Operations
- `projects` - Project management
- `clients` - Client relationships
- `invoices` - Billing and invoicing
- `monthly_expenses` - Financial tracking
- `hr_policies` - Policy documents

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx` - Application bootstrap
- `src/App.tsx` - Main routing and providers
- `src/pages/Index.tsx` - Root page component

### Authentication
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx` - Auth context and session management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Permission checking logic
- `src/pages/Login.tsx` - Authentication UI

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - Main app shell
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` - Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx` - Page header
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx` - Brand component

### Business Logic
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts` - Activity logging utilities
- `src/lib/format-date.ts` - Date formatting helpers
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts` - Leave calculation logic
- `src/lib/notifications.ts` - Notification system
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Access control
- `src/lib/utils.ts` - General utilities (cn function, etc.)

### Data Layer
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` - Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` - Generated TypeScript types

### UI Components
- `src/components/ui/` - shadcn/ui component library (40+ components)
- `src/components/finance/FinanceSummary.tsx` - Financial dashboard
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx` - Performance history
- `src/components/leave/` - Leave management components

## Configuration Files

- `vite.config.ts` - Build configuration with path aliases
- `tailwind.config.ts` - Styling configuration
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js` - Linting rules
- `playwright.config.ts` - E2E testing configuration
- `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts

## Business Logic Patterns

### Evaluation System
- Quarterly evaluations: Formal performance reviews with recommendations
- Daily evaluations: Peer feedback with direction (received/given)
- Role-based visibility: Managers see all, employees see their own + team lead feedback

### Payroll Processing
- Monthly payroll generation via Edge Functions
- Overtime calculations (regular + holiday)
- Loan deductions and bonus processing
- PDF payslip generation

### Leave Management
- Balance tracking with automatic accrual
- Approval workflows based on role hierarchy
- Working day calculations excluding weekends/holidays

### Financial Reporting
- Real-time dashboard with month-over-month comparisons
- 6-month trend charts using Recharts
- Currency formatting in Pakistani Rupees (PKR)

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- Feature-based component folders
- Shared utilities in `/lib`
- Type definitions co-located with components
- Consistent naming: PascalCase for components, camelCase for utilities

### State Management
- React Query for API state
- Local component state for UI
- Context for global app state (auth, theme)
- Optimistic updates for better UX

### Error Handling
- React Query error boundaries
- Toast notifications for user feedback
- Graceful loading states
- Form validation with Zod schemas

## Performance Considerations

- Code splitting by route
- Image optimization with lazy loading
- React Query caching strategies
- Bundle analysis and tree shaking
- Supabase RLS policies for data security

## Testing Strategy

- Unit tests with Vitest
- E2E tests with Playwright
- Component testing with React Testing Library
- API mocking for isolated testing

## Deployment

- Built with Vite for optimized production bundles
- Static hosting compatible (Vercel, Netlify)
- Environment variables for configuration
- Supabase handles backend scaling

This context provides the foundation for understanding the codebase structure, patterns, and business logic of Beudox HR.
